testcase.name: test_sales_no_bank_account_id_field_required
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter109_bank_summary.py:245: in test_sales_no_bank_account_id_field_required assert create_res.status_code == 200, f"Sale creation failed: {create_res.text}" E AssertionError: Sale creation failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","amount"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"sale_type":"branch","branch_id":"1c348f2b-294e-4353-bac1-0e32f759f109","payment_details":[{"mode":"bank","amount":100.0}],"discount":0,"date":"2026-01-15T10:00:00Z","notes":"TEST_Sale_No_BankAccountId_Iter109"}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
